{{CargoOrgan
|name=Chaotic Dragon Eye
|type=Bionic
|rank=red
|id=10714
|idx=72
|description="It watches us still — eyes that do not exist, yet gaze eternally upon all creation…"
— Codex Draconis
|skill=Before round start, 81.2% chance to trap the enemy in a Void Prison (skips their next turn) and apply 1 stack of Annihilation.
|hp=2128
|def=376
|atk=224
|rush=257
|gene1=Per orange or higher organ equipped, all ELMT DMG +24
Orange or higher organs equipped: 7/7
|gene2=Per Altar God Descent, {race} HP +70
Gods Descended: 30/30
|gene3=In Snail Arena, {race} ATK +140
|gene4=In Snail Arena, {race} RUSH +140
|gene5=Snail Arena, All ELMT RES +80
|gene6=In explorations, DMG +20% in Round 1
|gene7=For Round 1, DMG +10% (Awakened)
|}}
